audience: Business owners, HR teams, recruiters and communications managers at SMEs that want to use honest video in recruitment.
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Werkgevers helpen een geloofwaardige wervingsvideo plannen die functie, werkomgeving, mensen en verwachtingen duidelijk toont en kandidaten naar volledige vacature-informatie leidt.

searchIntent.question: How do we produce a credible recruitment video that shows the role, workplace and expectations and supports suitable candidates?
searchIntent.geographicContext: Employers in Belgium and international English-speaking candidates, with production available from Limburg, Belgium.

longTailKeywords: job vacancy video with real employees
directAnswer: A credible recruitment video shows representative work, real colleagues, the working environment and clear expectations. It complements a complete vacancy, uses voluntary informed participation, supports accessible viewing and directs candidates to an up-to-date application route.
title: Recruitment video for employers: show the work, culture and expectations
metaDescription: Planning a recruitment video? Show the role, colleagues and workplace honestly, and prepare interviews, inclusion, rights, versions and measurement.
h1: Recruitment video for employers: show the work, culture and expectations
factsToPreserve: The video complements rather than replaces complete and current written vacancy information.
Representative tasks and working conditions should be shown honestly without staging unsafe behaviour.
Employee participation should be voluntary, informed and without disadvantage, with particular care in an employment relationship.
Belgian equal-treatment, recruitment and image-rights guidance remains relevant and the article is not legal advice.
Captions, readable on-screen text and an accessible application route are part of the production scope.
Views alone do not prove recruitment value, and no applications or hires are guaranteed.
